Chamber Justice Throws Out Kolubah’s Appeal Against Expulsion
results.description: By Lincoln G. Peters MONROVIA, May 21, 2026 – The Supreme Court’s Chamber Justice, Yussif D. Kaba, has thrown out the petition filed by embattled Montserrado County District #10 Representative, Yekeh Kolubah, seeking to overturn his expulsion from the House of Representatives. Handing down his ruling on Wednesday, Justice Kaba noted that the House of ... results.title: US Pressures Palestinian UN Envoy to Drop General Assembly Vice Presidency Bid
results.description: President Donald Trump's administration threatened to revoke the visas of the Palestinian delegation to the United Nations if the Palestinian ambassador refuses to end his candidacy for the vice presidency of the UN General Assembly, according to an internal State Department cable seen by Reuters.

results.title: Al-Qaeda terrorist arrested in Sahiwal
results.description: Counter Terrorism Department (CTD) personnel have arrested a key member of a banned organization and recovered terror material during an operation in Sahiwal, reported 24NewsHD TV channel on Thursday.
